name: Haut à Courroies leather handbag
description:
A timeless and highly collectible Hermès Haut à Courroies 32 crafted in rich Blue Indigo Fjord leather with classic gold-plated hardware. Dating to 1988, this piece embodies the heritage and equestrian roots of the HAC design — the original predecessor to the Birkin.
The structured silhouette is beautifully balanced by Fjord leather’s signature natural grain and durability, making it both luxurious and practical. The deep Blue Indigo tone paired with warm gold hardware creates a refined, sophisticated contrast suitable for year-round wear. A rare vintage find in a highly desirable leather, ideal for collectors and Hermès enthusiasts seeking a heritage piece with presence and character.
Hardware tarnished, leather aging, The corners have been professionally retouched with color to address wear. The touch-ups are visible upon close inspection and are reflected in the pricing.

SKU0066220
